Young Song (415-722-8587) Plaintiff in Pro Per.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT's (Epmi A Bayside Company) Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to March 27, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than March 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT (EPMI)'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is taken off calendar. The moving party shall re-set the motion in department 501 pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.10A1. That department handles all landlord-tenant related motions. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)
